message:
feat: R2 spill + partitioned join for bounded-memory edge queries

Edge path (QueryDO/FragmentDO) previously materialized all rows in
memory via monolithic WASM execution, causing OOMs on large ORDER BY,
JOIN, or unbounded SELECT queries within the 128MB DO limit.

- Add R2SpillBackend (r2-spill.ts): streaming NDJSON spill to R2 with
  chunked reads/writes, retry/timeout resilience, and cleanup-on-finally
- Extract SpillBackend interface + FsSpillBackend from ExternalSortOperator;
  k-way merge now yields 4096-row batches instead of collecting all rows
- Add Grace hash join to HashJoinOperator: partitions both sides with
  per-bucket memory budgets and incremental spill when build side exceeds
  32MB edge budget
- Add EdgeScanOperator: page-by-page fetch+decode for Parquet via 3-tier
  cache (WASM pool → caches.default → R2), bounded to one page per next()
- Wire operator pipeline into QueryDO (executeWithPipeline, executeJoin)
  and FragmentDO for all unbounded queries (no LIMIT → pipeline path)
- Add spillBytesWritten/spillBytesRead telemetry to QueryResult
